name: @letta-ai/muscle-memory
description: A Letta Code mod that watches an agent's real tool-use, distills recurring fixes into quality-gated SKILL.md playbooks, updates existing skills instead of duplicating them, and prunes the ones that don't earn their context — a skill library that maintains itself.
author: Adrian with Kev and Mack

scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run verify:bundle && npm run test && npm run eval:routing
scripts.verify:bundle: bun build mods/index.ts --target node --outfile /tmp/mm-bundle-drift-check.mjs && cmp -s /tmp/mm-bundle-drift-check.mjs mods/index.bundled.mjs && echo 'bundle matches source' || (echo 'BUNDLE DRIFT: mods/index.bundled.mjs does not match source — run npm run build and commit the bundle' && exit 1)
